SEARCH
Package com.example.edgers_lottery

Class Event

java.lang.Object
com.example.edgers_lottery.Event
public class Event extends Object
Model class representing a lottery event. Stores all event details including scheduling, capacity, registration windows, participant lists, and location enforcement. Used throughout the app and mapped to Firestore documents in the events collection.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Event()
    Default no-argument constructor required by Firestore for deserialization.
    Event(String name, String description, String date, String time, String location, User organizer, int capacity, String registrationStart, String registrationEnd)
    Constructs a new Event with all core fields.

  • Constructor Details

    • Event

      public Event()
      Default no-argument constructor required by Firestore for deserialization.

    • Event

      public Event(String name, String description, String date, String time, String location, User organizer, int capacity, String registrationStart, String registrationEnd)
      Constructs a new Event with all core fields.
      Parameters:
      name - the display name of the event
      description - a description of the event
      date - the date of the event in yyyy-MM-dd format
      time - the time of the event
      location - the location of the event
      organizer - the User organizing the event (not stored directly)
      capacity - the maximum number of entrants allowed
      registrationStart - the start of the registration window
      registrationEnd - the end of the registration window

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public String getId()
      Returns:
      the unique Firestore document ID of this event

    • setId

      public void setId(String id)
      Parameters:
      id - the Firestore document ID to assign to this event

      Returns:

      Returns:

      Returns:

      Returns:

    • getWaitingList

      public ArrayList<User> getWaitingList()
      Returns:
      the list of users on the waiting list

    • setWaitingList

      public void setWaitingList(ArrayList<User> waitingList)
      Parameters:
      waitingList - the waiting list to set

    • getInvitedUsers

      public ArrayList<User> getInvitedUsers()
      Returns:
      the list of users invited after the lottery draw

    • setInvitedUsers

      public void setInvitedUsers(ArrayList<User> invitedUsers)
      Parameters:
      invitedUsers - the invited users list to set

    • getEntrants

      public ArrayList<User> getEntrants()
      Returns:
      the list of confirmed event entrants

    • setEntrants

      public void setEntrants(ArrayList<User> entrants)
      Parameters:
      entrants - the entrants list to set

    • isEnforceLocation

      public boolean isEnforceLocation()
      Returns:
      true if entrants are required to be at the event location

    • setEnforceLocation

      public void setEnforceLocation(boolean enforceLocation)
      Parameters:
      enforceLocation - true to require location enforcement, false otherwise

    • getOrganizerId

      public String getOrganizerId()
      Returns:
      the Firestore document ID of the organizer user

    • setOrganizerId

      public void setOrganizerId(String organizerId)
      Parameters:
      organizerId - the organizer's Firestore document ID to set
